Explanation: The search for a Malayalam movie released between 2008 and 2011 with all the specified criteria (island setting with the same name as the movie, main character a servant, main actress a fisherman's daughter, main actor won an award for this role, two directors and two writers with one overlap, only one production company, a person is killed, and it being the second movie of the main actor) led to the movie "Kutti Srank." However, the search results did not provide a direct confirmation of all the criteria, especially regarding the main actor's filmography and award in the release year. No other movie matching all criteria was found.
Exact Answer: Kutti Srank
Confidence: 70%
